Restaurant_Receipt_May2024: Proof of purchase from Central East Asian Cuisine on May 30, 2024, confirming the plaintiff was a customer and ordered the Big Plate Whole Chicken dish.
Dental_Xray_and_Medical_Records: Professional dental records and X-rays from the consultation following the incident, proving the tooth fracture and the medical necessity for extraction and implant.
Dental_Implant_Invoices: Detailed billing statements and payment receipts for the dental implant procedure, providing evidence for the $4,500 in economic damages.
Witness_Statements: Written testimonies from the two friends present during the meal to corroborate the occurrence of the injury and the immediate report to restaurant staff.
Incident_Photos: Photographs of the food and the specific bone fragment responsible for the injury, if captured at the time of the incident to demonstrate the hazard.
